summary: Tested Marketing Assistent module for ChatEmbed AI. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. Fixed missing Growth plan in /api/billing/plans endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/marketing/skills returns 10 skills with German labels
Backend: All 10 expected skill keys present (copywriting, cold-email, page-cro, pricing-strategy, email-sequence, seo-audit, social-content, launch-strategy, churn-prevention, referral-program)
Backend: Skills have German labels (e.g., 'Landing Page Text schreiben', 'Kalt-Akquise E-Mails')
Backend: Skills have required fields (label, description, icon, example)
Backend: GET /api/marketing/usage returns used, limit, plan, trial_active, trial_end
Backend: Usage values have correct types (int, bool, string)
Backend: Test user has active trial (trial_active=true, trial_end=2026-04-22)
Backend: POST /api/marketing/start-trial returns 400 for user who already used trial
Backend: POST /api/marketing/run requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/marketing/run requires skillName and message (400)
Backend: POST /api/marketing/run rejects invalid skill name (400)
Backend: POST /api/marketing/run works for trial user - returns AI-generated result with used/limit
Backend: POST /api/marketing/save saves result successfully
Backend: GET /api/marketing/history returns saved results
Backend: GET /api/billing/plans returns 5 plans (free, starter, pro, growth, agency)
Backend: Growth plan at €99/month with correct features
Backend: Plans in correct order
Backend: Config has growth plan limits (50 marketing runs)
Frontend: Landing page has marketing section with 6 feature cards
Frontend: Landing page has 'Growth-Plan 7 Tage kostenlos testen' CTA
Frontend: Pricing page shows 5 plans (Free, Starter, Pro, Growth, Agentur)
Frontend: Growth plan highlighted at €99 with Marketing Assistent features
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Marketing Assistent' with green 'NEU' badge
Frontend: Marketing page shows skill grid with 10 cards for trial user
Frontend: Marketing page shows trial badge 'Testphase aktiv — bis 2026-04-22'
Frontend: Marketing page shows usage bar (3/50 Analysen)
Frontend: Skill input view shows German labels and input fields
Frontend: All 10 skill cards visible with German labels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Assistent module fully tested. Test user (test@chatembed.de) has active 7-day trial until 2026-04-22. All 10 marketing skills working with Claude AI integration. Fixed missing Growth plan in /api/billing/plans endpoint. All German UI labels verified.

mocked_apis.claude_ai: REAL - calls Claude via Emergent LLM key (takes 10-15 seconds)

frontend_marketing_page.usage_bar: Shows X/50 Analysen diesen Monat verwendet

fixes_applied.fix: Added growth plan with €99/month price and Marketing Assistent features
